title: Light Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Light_Manipulation.jpg|thumb|center|500px|Harry Potter using the "Lumos" spell for illumination.]]

==Summary==
The power to '''manipulate light'''. 

The user can create, shape and manipulate visible light, commonly referred to simply as light, which is electromagnetic radiation that is visible to the human eye, and is responsible for the sense of sight.

Primary properties of visible light are intensity, propagation direction, frequency or wavelength spectrum, and polarisation, while its speed in a vacuum (299,792,458 meters per second/186,000 MPS) is one of the fundamental constants of nature. Visible light, as with all types of electromagnetic radiation (EMR), is experimentally found to always move at this speed in vacuum.

==Possible Uses==
*Create/generate/increase, absorb, shape and manipulate light and colors.
*Bend and/or shift light particles
**Holographic Projection
**[[Invisibility]]
**Visual [[Illusion Creation|Illusions]]
*[[Flight]]/Levitation
*Light Attacks
*Treating light as a solid
**Photokinetic Constructs, including weapons, armor, walls or allies/servants.
*Moving at light-speed.

==Limitations==
*May be unable to create light, being limited to manipulating only from already existing sources.
*Distance, energy mass, precision, etc. depend upon of the knowledge, skill, and strength of the user.
*Users light is affected by everything that all light is, unless they are powerful/skilled enough to overcome these limits:
**Glass and other reflective surfaces may disarm attacks.
**[[Gravity Manipulation]] bends light as a result of the [[wikipedia:Gravitational lens|gravitational lensing effect]].
**No matter how powerful the light is it may pass through anything completely transparent.
*May be overwhelmed by Darkness Manipulation.

==Users==
*[[Borsalino (Admiral Kizaru)|Kizaru]] ([[One Piece]])
*[[Bakal Kozar]] ([[Defender's Quest: Valley of the Forgotten]])
*[[Tien Shinhan]] ([[Dragon Ball]])
